name: LessonOption
goal: Render a single multiple-choice answer choice as a slotted child of lesson-question — text comes from the default slot; correctness is a boolean attribute.
description: Light-content multiple-choice option. By default renders as a static row (marker + text) so it works inside read-only study guides and vis documents. When the parent question opts in to interactive mode, lesson-option flips to a clickable <button> and emits lesson-option-pick with { value, correct } on click. The picked + revealed + correct attributes together drive the post-pick visual state (green check on correct, red ✗ on picked-but-wrong); the parent question is responsible for setting them. Text content comes from the default slot — typed renderers (<code>, <a>, <time>) compose freely (CDR-002).

props.name: correct
props.description: Marks this option as the correct answer. Drives the green-check reveal state when combined with revealed.

props.name: value
props.description: Opaque identifier emitted in the lesson-option-pick event detail. Falls back to the slotted text when omitted.

props.name: interactive
props.description: Opt-in to clickable behaviour (CDR-004). Renders as a <button> and emits lesson-option-pick on click. Set by a parent lesson-question[interactive].

props.name: picked
props.description: Set by the parent question after the learner selects this option. Drives the post-pick visual state.

props.name: revealed
props.description: Set by the parent question to expose correct/wrong markers. In static mode the parent sets this on render so the answer is visible by default.

events.name: lesson-option-pick
events.description: Fires once when the learner clicks an interactive option. value is the attribute when set, otherwise the trimmed slotted text.

slots.description: Option text. Accepts inline HTML so typed renderers (<code>, <a>, <time>) compose.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-green
cssVariables.description: Correct option border + marker + tag color when revealed.
